name: Refried Beans (Currie)
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Bacon fat or canola oil
3 cups Cooked kidney or black beans
recipeInstructions:
Any type of beans may be refried. Extra servings may be frozen and reheated.
Stir cook onion and garlic in fat over medium heat in a nonstick pan until the onion is translucent.
Add beans gradually and mash with the back of a wooden spoon. Cook and stir until thickened. Add hot pepper sauce. Shape into a roll and serve on a plate.
1/6 recipe = 130 calories, 1 starchy choice, 1 protein choice, 1.8 grams total fat, 0 saturated fat, 0 cholesterol, 7 grams protein, 21 grams carbohydrate, 133 mg sodium, 339 mg potassium. High in fiber.
MEXICAN BEANS variation: Stir 1/2 cup shredded Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese and 1 teaspoon chili powder into the hot bean mixture until the cheese melts.
1/6 recipe = 169 calories, 1 starchy choice, 1 protein choice, 0.5 grams total fat, 2 grams saturated fat, 9 mg cholesterol, 10 grams protein, 21 grams carbohydrate, 194 mg sodium, 319 mg potassium. High in fiber.
